Hero.description: GGUN connects employers who need temporary workers with reliable people ready to work. Post a job, get matched by location and reliability, and coordinate everything in one app.

Features.label: Features
Features.title: Everything you need in one app
Features.subtitle: GGUN is built to make temporary work simple, safe, and reliable for everyone.
Features.locationMatchingDesc: Our algorithm matches workers with nearby jobs using smart proximity scoring, so you always find help close to you.
Features.reliabilityScoringDesc: Workers build trust through verified reviews and a reliability score, so employers always get dependable help.
Features.teamCoordinationDesc: Built-in group chat lets employers and workers coordinate schedules, location details, and tasks in real time.
Features.seamlessPaymentsDesc: Secure payment processing through Toss Payments. Employers pay easily, workers get paid fast.
Features.realTimeNotificationsDesc: Instant push notifications for new job offers, worker confirmations, and payment updates. Never miss an opportunity.
Features.mapIntegrationDesc: See work locations on a map, get directions, and find jobs near you with integrated Naver Maps.

HowItWorks.label: How It Works
HowItWorks.title: From sign-up to payday in 4 steps
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Get GGUN from the App Store or Google Play. Sign up as an employer or worker in under a minute.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Employers post jobs with details like location, pay, and workers needed. Workers browse or get auto-matched.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Our algorithm finds the best matches based on location, reliability, and availability. Accept with one tap.
HowItWorks.step4Desc: Coordinate via group chat, complete the work, and process payments securely through the app.

Employers.label: For Employers
Employers.title: Get reliable help, fast
Employers.description: Stop wasting time searching for temporary workers. Post what you need, and our matching system finds dependable people nearby.
Employers.benefit1: Post jobs in under 2 minutes with all the details
Employers.benefit3: Group chat to coordinate with your entire team
Employers.benefit4: Secure payments through Toss Payments integration
Employers.benefit5: Review workers and build your trusted network

Workers.label: For Workers
Workers.title: Work on your terms
Workers.description: Browse jobs near you, accept with one tap, and build your reputation. No long-term commitments — just flexible, honest work.
Workers.benefit1: Browse nearby jobs or get auto-matched instantly
Workers.benefit3: Build your reliability score for better matches
Workers.benefit4: Get paid quickly through secure in-app payments
Workers.benefit5: Toggle availability on or off whenever you want

CTA.title: Ready to get started?
CTA.description: Download GGUN today and join thousands of employers and workers who are already making temporary work simpler.

Footer.tagline: Connecting employers with reliable temporary workers. Post a job, get matched, get it done.
